title: KINGLAKE 200 Pcs Non-woven Plant Seedling Bags Biodegradable Fabric Grow Breeding Bags with 100pcs 4" Plant Labels(4.4 x 8.5 cm+ 8 x 15 cm)
features: Quantity: total 200 pcs fabric plant seedling bags and 100pcs 10x2cm green plant labels,100pcs each size. Size after putting the soil: approx 4.4 x 8.5 cm+ 7.8 x 15 cm (diameter x height).
Eco-friendly and biodegradable non-woven fabric material, even don't need to remove the bag when transplanting and reduce recycling cost.
Excellent water permeability and breathability, delicate roots can punch through the bags, moisture and nutrients are free to penetrate.
Seedlings grow faster after transplanting due to "air-pruned" effect, improve seedling survival rate and ensure the plant grow well.
Prevent seedling in plastic plant pots from forming entangle roots, rot roots and damaged roots and more due to inability to penetrate the container walls.
description: Please note: Non-woven seedling bags gradually degrades within 1~6 months due to frequent watering, in wet soil environment or high humidity weather conditions, and ideal for plants that love water, humidity. If has any questions, please let us know by email. Product details: Material: non-woven fabric Size after putting the soil: approx 4.4cm x 8.5 cm+ 7.8cm x 15 cm (diameter x height); Package contains: total 200 pcs seedling bags with 100pcs 4" plastic plant labels, 100pcs every size. Planting bags are eco-friendly alternatives to traditional plastic or metal plant pots for reducing recycling cost. Delicate roots can punch through seedling bags for reducing forming entangle roots, rot roots and more. Roots grow well and faster after transplanting as they're "air-pruned" when they reach the edge of growing bags. Light weight for easy carrying, double stitched at the bottom, strong and durable. The planting bags can prevent seedling in plastic plant pots from forming entangle roots, rot roots and damaged roots and more due to inability to penetrate the container walls.
